message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "ユーザ" as User
participant "ブラウザ" as Browser
participant "web.php" as WebPHP
participant "Kouka1_1Controller" as Controller
participant "Kouka1_1.index.blade.php" as IndexBlade
participant "layout.kouka1_1.blade.php" as LayoutBlade
participant "components.menu.blade.php" as MenuBlade
participant "components.subview.blade.php" as SubviewBlade

User -> Browser: 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka1_1]
Browser -> WebPHP: GET[/kouka1_1]
WebPHP -> Controller: @index
Controller -> IndexBlade: 
IndexBlade -> LayoutBlade: @extends
LayoutBlade --> IndexBlade
LayoutBlade -> MenuBlade: @component
MenuBlade --> LayoutBlade
MenuBlade -> SubviewBlade: @include
SubviewBlade --> MenuBlade

@enduml
```
